summary: Phase 3 check-alignment workflow integration: (R22) Per-caller strictness model. (R23) build_alignment_report() in review_change_impl.rs for implementation review prompt injection. (R24) build_alignment_report() in review_change_spec.rs for spec review prompt injection. (R25) alignment_warnings field in workflow/mod.rs route() for eligible phases. (R26) Violation JSON schema in collect_alignment_warnings(). (R27) Error isolation with tracing::warn and graceful degradation. (R28) @spec annotation instruction in create_change_impl.rs prompt. Also includes artifact-tools-phase3 (create_change_spec.rs post-write validation) and change-merge-phase3 (post-merge alignment checks in create_change_merge.rs).
